original: Looking for a little support without the judgment that comes from covering up your chest like some kind of coreward prude? Look no farther! The invisiharness is nearly imperceptible to 96.3% of known galactic species thanks to the integration of specially a modulated stealth field and wireless power from a battery pack small enough to carry in most purses. Buy yours today!
context: <<POS:05606586>> e.tooltip='Looking for a little support without the judgment that comes'
